overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Asklepios. The character walks along exterior colonnades, enters a courtyard with a large marble statue of a figure wrestling a snake, and explores interior rooms with ancient Greek murals and furnishings.

agents.ego_description: walking along cobblestone path beside the sanctuary colonnade

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing near the sanctuary entrance

entered.detail: sunlit stone pathway with grass growing between cracks
ancient stone building with columns and blue banners featuring owl symbols
tall slender evergreen trees against the hillside
deep blue fabric banners with golden owl emblems hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone path beside the Sanctuary of Asklepios. Tall cypress trees line the left side while the stone colonnade with blue banners rises on the right. A small group of robed NPCs stands near the building entrance.

events.description: enters covered colonnade of sanctuary from exterior path
light shifts to dappled shade under the wooden ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the columned corridor with detailed painted walls

entered.detail: fluted marble columns supporting the roof structure
ancient Greek frescoes depicting battle scenes in red and orange pigments
heavy timber beams spanning between stone supports
smooth cut stone tiles in the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered colonnade, transitioning from bright sunlight to dappled shade. The corridor features massive fluted columns and walls covered in ancient murals depicting battle scenes. The wooden ceiling beams create patterns of light and shadow on the stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctuary courtyard with central statue

events.description: exits corridor into open courtyard with large marble statue
camera tilts upward to examine the statue's upper body and face

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the central marble statue of a figure wrestling a snake

entered.detail: large classical sculpture of muscular figure entwined with a golden snake
bushes with bright pink and magenta flowers flanking the courtyard
bushes with bright pink and magenta flowers flanking the courtyard
bronze fire bowl with flames burning at the base of the statue

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the character enters a sunlit courtyard dominated by a massive marble statue of a figure wrestling a golden snake. Flowering oleander bushes with pink blossoms frame the space. The camera tilts up to examine the statue's detailed musculature and anguished expression before looking down at the altar with scattered rose petals.

events.description: turns left to follow the colonnade perimeter around the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard perimeter examining wall murals and architectural details

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking along the colonnade in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large rectangular planters with greenery against the wall
simple stone seating along the colonnade wall
dark entrance leading into the guesthouse interior

segments.scene_description: The character circles the courtyard perimeter under the covered colonnade, passing detailed murals depicting ancient battles. A robed NPC walks in the opposite direction along the corridor. The camera passes wooden planters and stone benches before approaching a doorway leading into the interior guesthouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior guesthouse rooms with stone walls

events.description: enters interior room from courtyard colonnade
lighting shifts to dimmer interior ambiance with window light

agents.ego_description: exploring the furnished interior rooms with stone walls and wooden screens

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls of the interior chamber
intricately carved wooden room dividers with geometric patterns
large ornate rug with red and blue geometric patterns covering the floor
stone hearth with ashes and firewood
heavy golden fabric drapes partitioning the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters the guesthouse interior, moving from the bright courtyard into dimmer stone rooms. The space features ornate wooden lattice screens, Persian-style rugs, and a stone fireplace. The camera explores past wooden furniture and scrolls before approaching yellow curtains that partition the inner chambers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright, open exterior of the Sanctuary of Asklepios into the dim, ornate interiors of a guesthouse. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone path lined with cypress trees and blue banners before transitioning into the dappled shade of a covered colonnade featuring massive fluted columns and battle murals. As the character emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a brilliant courtyard dominated by a marble statue of a figure wrestling a golden snake, framed by pink oleander blossoms. The camera then circles the perimeter of the courtyard, passing stone benches and robed NPCs under the shade of the colonnade before approaching a doorway. Finally, the movement shifts from the bright outdoor light into the dimmer stone rooms of the guesthouse, gliding past Persian rugs and wooden lattice screens toward yellow partitioning curtains.
